title: DHS promulgates final rule to replace "gender" with "sex" in TSA regulations
description_html:
DHS promulgated a final rule making amendments to Transportation Security Administration (TSA) regulations to conform with EO 14168, "Defending Women from Gender Ideology Extremism and Restoring Biological Truth to the Federal Government." The amendments replace the term “gender” with “sex” wherever it appears in TSA’s regulations.

Trump 2.0 [ID #1766]
